description.en-US: Catechist, exegete, and martyr-by-confession (c. 185–c. 253). The most prolific and controversial of the Alexandrian Fathers — his commentaries on Scripture set the agenda for Christian exegesis.

body.en-US: Catechist, exegete, and martyr-by-confession (c. 185–c. 253). The most prolific and controversial of the Alexandrian Fathers — his commentaries on Scripture set the agenda for Christian exegesis.
8 works in the canonical 19th-century English translations (ANF / NPNF, ed. Roberts & Donaldson / Schaff & Wace), sourced from the New Advent archive.
